title: Property Consultant - Housing.com - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Housing.com - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Housing.com has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!
